title: Subway Surfers Achievement Sound (Toasts)
description: This pack sets toast sounds (also known as advancements, recipes, notifications, etc.) as Subway Surfer's achievement sound.
body:
**This pack sets the toast sound as the achievement sound from Subway Surfers**

# 📺 Example Video:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Ne4dqwDWFrE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# 🔩 Supports:
- 1.21.9+
- Would NOT work if another pack that changes **toast sounds** is ABOVE this pack on the pack list.

# 🎈 More Info:

<details>
<summary>🧰 Updates</summary>
We will update the pack as quickly as we can after a new Minecraft version comes out.
</details>

<details>
<summary>⚙ Installation</summary>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hZZ3U417VOI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</details>

<details>
<summary>🎨 Altering, Customizing, and Uploading the Pack</summary>
You can change assets inside the pack, but you cannot upload it anywhere (Modrinth, Curseforge, Social Media, etc.). Use it for yourself and the people you know. If you want to create addons/extensions for my packs, please delete all the assets I made, then upload your own anywhere you'd like.
</details>
